title: Snow Golems In Hot Biomes
description: The "Snow Golems in Hot Biomes" mod for Fabric allows players to summon and maintain snow golems even in hot and hostile environments such as deserts and the Nether.
body:
The "Snow Golems in Hot Biomes" mod for Fabric allows players to summon and maintain snow golems even in hot and hostile environments such as deserts or the Nether. This mod ensures your frosty friends can survive and thrive, bringing a touch of winter magic to the hottest parts of your Minecraft world.

For bugs and feature requests:

[Snow Golems in Hot Biomes Discord](https://discord.gg/vBVKGJ2TMh)
